rationale: Decomposition/parity lens. Fix 1 ADDRESSED: BranchExistsE is the branch-probe leg that ScanOrphanedClosedBeads already consumes (R1) — the same seam, so adding it plus TestBranchExistsE_ThreeWay folds into the existing lifecycle error-preserving-refactor bead, NOT a new bead. TestBranchExistsE_ThreeWay sits in internal/gitutil beside the seam; TestApproveImpl_DeletedBranchNoRefusal is a normal-path pin in internal/approve (the gate bead). No over-scope: the In-Scope list still cleaves into ~2-3 pannellable beads (gitutil seam + lifecycle core + complete predicate / approve gate R1-R3 / docs+ADR+ownership). Impacted-Domains parity intact and exact: internal/gitutil under execution (OWNERSHIP.yaml:4, verified — paths order executor=2/bead=3/gitutil=4), internal/executor:2, internal/lifecycle claimed by workflow:9 and absent from execution (AC10 exactly-one invariant holds). No path touched-but-undeclared or declared-but-untouched introduced: the edit only references RevParseRef/ErrRefNotFound in the already-declared gitops.go and adds tests in already-declared packages. Fix 2 ADDRESSED: AC1 now runs exact-named `-run 'TestScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving'` with the bare package run retained as a no-regression pin. All four discriminators 0 code hits at 4cbf437b (RED). Diff touched only spec.md + panel artifacts. No new defect; worktree left clean.

findings.label: BranchExistsE three-way contract — decomposition + parity
findings.detail: The gitutil seam does NOT over-scope bead 1: BranchExistsE is precisely the branch-existence-probe leg the ScanOrphanedClosedBeads error-preserving core consumes, so the one-function seam + TestBranchExistsE_ThreeWay fold naturally into the same lifecycle-refactor bead (round-3 assessment holds). Spec still cleaves into ~2-3 pannellable beads. Parity: internal/gitutil is execution-owned (execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml:4, citation exact); TestBranchExistsE_ThreeWay lives in internal/gitutil (execution), TestApproveImpl_DeletedBranchNoRefusal in internal/approve (workflow) — both declared. Sub-parts a-e present: R1 branch-probe leg + OQ2 asymmetry note + Scope gitutil bullet all state the three-way contract citing RevParseRef/ErrRefNotFound exit-1-vs-128; R1 Falsified-if gained the anti-false-refusal falsifier; AC1(c) TestBranchExistsE_ThreeWay; AC2(d) deleted-branch normal-path pin; AC1(b) wrapper-parity tightened to a MIXED closed-bead list. No touched-but-undeclared or declared-but-untouched path introduced.

findings.label: AC1 lifecycle proof exact-named

Outside my primary lens but verified as done.
